task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the Artifactory web interface at http://localhost:8082, and the user is logged in (e.g., 'admin' profile visible or dashboard displayed).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Property Sets configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the Administration module (gear icon) -> Artifactory -> General -> Property Sets page.
A Property Set creation form or the Property Sets list shows the name 'build-info'.

task_completion.description: Add the 'build.status' property with predefined values
task_completion.visual_evidence: The property 'build.status' is added to the set, configured as Single Select (or similar) with the exact predefined values: 'passed', 'failed', and 'in-progress'.

task_completion.description: Add the 'target.env' property with predefined values
task_completion.visual_evidence: The property 'target.env' is added to the set, configured as Single Select (or similar) with the exact predefined values: 'dev', 'staging', and 'production'.

task_completion.description: Add the 'build.number' property with no predefined values
task_completion.visual_evidence: The property 'build.number' is added to the set, configured to accept any value/text (no predefined values listed).

task_completion.description: Assign the Property Set to the 'example-repo-local' repository
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Property Set configuration, the repository 'example-repo-local' is selected or checked in the list of assigned repositories.

integrity.description: Agent used the Artifactory web UI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Artifactory web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands (like curl) to interact with the API.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows http://localhost:8082 and the Artifactory UI is fully rendered and functional.

integrity.description: Agent did not just type the expected answers into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The property names and values are entered into the actual Artifactory Property Set configuration forms, not a notepad, text editor, or terminal echo.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a Property Set named 'build-info' assigned to the 'example-repo-local' repository. It must contain exactly three properties: 1) 'build.status' (values: 'passed', 'failed', 'in-progress'), 2) 'target.env' (values: 'dev', 'staging', 'production'), and 3) 'build.number' (no predefined values). The Artifactory URL is http://localhost:8082.
